name: toille-vue
description: A test website for Elliot Dickerson

scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.build:server: vite build --config vite.config.ssr.ts --ssr && find functions -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -name '*.png' -o -name '*.svg' -o -name '*.ico' -o -name '*.xml' -o -name '*.txt' -o -name '*.webmanifest' -o -name '_headers' \) -delete
scripts.pages:dev: mv wrangler.toml wrangler.toml.bak && wrangler pages dev --d1 DB=toille-vue-db -- bun run dev; mv wrangler.toml.bak wrangler.toml
